questions.question: Paul says in the last days people will be lovers of what instead of lovers of God?
questions.feedback: In the last days people will be lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God.

questions.question: Paul says all Scripture is breathed out by God and profitable for what?
options: Teaching, reproof, correction, and training in righteousness
questions.correct: Teaching, reproof, correction, and training in righteousness
questions.feedback: All Scripture is God-breathed and useful for teaching, reproof, correction, and training in righteousness.

questions.question: Paul says everyone who wants to live a godly life in Christ Jesus will be persecuted.
questions.feedback: All who desire to live a godly life in Christ Jesus will be persecuted.

questions.question: Paul says that from childhood Timothy has known the sacred _____ which are able to make him wise for salvation.
questions.feedback: Timothy has known the sacred writings since childhood.

questions.question: Paul says evil people and impostors will go from bad to _____, deceiving and being deceived.
questions.feedback: Evil people and impostors will go from bad to worse.
